text:
The meeting room, separated from me by a transparent barrier, feels like a liminal space—half private, half public. I sense a blend of anticipation and detachment as I sit outside, an observer of thought and collaboration unfolding within.

Stepping into the vibrant R+D room, I am struck by the juxtaposition of technology and creative possibility. The word "coexist" resonates with me here, both as a philosophical challenge and an invitation. Surrounded by inventive displays and textual reflections, I feel inspired by humanity's perpetual quest for meaning and connection in ever-evolving forms.
